termlists._comment: In Norwegian, the construction terms (translations of ecobuilding etc.) are added to the phrase below as it needs more flexibility in this language. Svanemerk is a Norwegian ecolabelling scheme
truncated as 'eco' causes noise if not. 'Grønn' (NO) is truncated to avoid 'grønnsak'. Duplicated to separate pre-search.
'behandling' (NO) not included, as mostly seems to result in e.g. 'miljøbehandling' in health
The space in front of 'handling' (EN/NO) is necessary to prevent 'behandling' in Norwegian. Not needed in other languages potentially.
truncated as 'eco' causes noise if not. 'Grønn' (NO) is truncated to avoid 'grønnsak'. Duplicated from scp pre-search

phrases._comment: Here in the title search it is simplified, so that `national OR regional...` etc. is not included

wordlist_no: handlingsprogrammet for bærekraftig forbruk og produksjon

termlists._comment: Terms that already indicate USE of resources (2d) - combined with sustainable/eco etc (2a). Duplicated in 12.2 phrase 2, 3 & 4.
Terms that are just resources (2e) - combined with sustainable/eco (2a) and management/extraction (2c). Duplicated in 12.2 phrase 2, 3 & 4.

phrases._comment: Here we reuse the natural resources and management/use terms from phrase 1 (but note that this phrase also includes terms for some unsustaibable natural resources)

termlists._comment: Terms that already indicate USE of resources (2d) - combined with sustainable/eco etc (2a). Duplicated from 12.2 phrase 1
Terms that are just resources (2e) - combined with sustainable/eco (2a) and management/extraction (2c). Duplicated from 12.2 phrase 1

phrases._comment: Here we reuse the parts/all of the scp string, even though it is slightly wider than the original WoS combination string. In addition, there are two other new elements added:  'efficient use' (in WOS = ('saving' OR 'save$' OR 'conserv*' OR 'efficien*') NEAR/5 ('use' OR 'using' OR 'usage' OR 'utili*' OR 'consumption')). circular economy (stands alone without having to mention natural resources in WOS). And combine it with the natural resources strings in phrase 1

termlists._comment: Terms that already indicate USE of resources (2d) - combined with sustainable/eco etc (2a). Duplicated from 12.2 phrase 1
Terms that are just resources (2e) - combined with sustainable/eco (2a) and management/extraction (2c). Duplicated from 12.2 phrase 1

phrases._comment: Here we reuse the natural resources strings in phrase 1/2, but some more of the terms are combined with 'resources'. (to avoid being too general, e.g. 'loss + land' is forced to 'loss + land + resources'). As this is a title search, we do not include the 'reduce' element - so it is expanded to be about consumption generally

termlists._comment: 'using' caused a lot of noise, many results about for example 'Examining resource x USING method y', and not actually about use of the resource. Extraction is specified as 'extracts' gives results from oil extracts
Terms that already indicate USE of resources (2d) - combined with sustainable/eco etc (2a). Duplicated from 12.2 phrase 1
Terms that are just resources (2e) - combined with sustainable/eco (2a) and management/extraction (2c). Duplicated from 12.2 phrase 1
Space before ' rice' to avoid 'price', similarly 'sau/svin' (NO) and after 'xxxfor' (NO, to avoid 'forbund' etc.). Note that 'agricultur' will also cover e.g. 'ecoagriculture'

'organic' is not used alone, but is instead combined in phrases to avoid e.g. organic acids, organic matter. Moved to this part rather than 4j as it can stand alone. 'bærekraftig fôr' (NO) is added specifically due to it's inclusion as a priority area ('samfunnsoppdrag') in the governments Long-term plan.
This works ok without the NOT phrase in a title search. Duplicated to 12.3 phrase 2
This works ok without the NOT phrase in a title search. Duplicated from 12.4 phrase 1

termlists._comment: This is a specific phrase included for the Norwegian searches - there are a number of reports with risk assessments for 'herbicide tolerant' GM crops

phrases._comment: Reuse 4a from above (sustainable OR responsible etc.)

termlists._comment: The space after 'litter ' is intentional to stop 'litteratur' (NO)

phrases._comment: Reuse phrasedefault12_4f, phrasedefault12_4c and phrasespecific12_4c from phrases 1 and 2 (wastes and chemicals)
Reuse phrasedefault12_4f, phrasedefault12_4c and phrasespecific12_4c from phrases 1 and 2 (wastes and chemicals)

termlists._comment: inkludert 'minim' fra EN liste. Må dobbeltsjekkes at det ikke gir irrelevante treff
Waste terms with multiple meanings. The space after 'litter ' is intentional to stop 'litteratur' (NO)
Waste terms which are generally to do with physical/chemical waste. Most Norwegian terms are covered by 'avfall' (e.g. spesialavfall, landbruksavfall) and don't needs specifying.

phrases._comment: Here we use the whole scp phrase, and supplement with 6a + scp2

termlists._comment: 'Industri' (NO) has a space after to prevent 'industriasliert' but allow e.g. 'kjemikalieindustri'. Duplicated to 12.6 phrase 2

phrases._comment: Reuse lists phrasespecific12_6c and phrasedefault12_6c from phrase 1 for companies terms

termlists._comment: 'environmental' works ok alone in English, but in Norwegian (miljø) creates some noise.
'Industri' (NO) has a space after to prevent 'industriasliert' but allow e.g. 'kjemikalieindustri'
We have not included 7d in the final search as it lost relevant results in a title search. A few less relevant creep in (about e.g. consumer purchasing), but more relevant are lost.
Inkludert 'inform' fra EN liste. Må dobbeltsjekkes at det ikke gir irrelevante treff

Using the country strings already created, and the capacity string from phrase 1.
Simplified to remove the 'effect' terms - not really needed
